sentences.arabic: تَبْدَأُ لَيْلَى يَوْمَهَا بِكِتَابَةِ قَائِمَةِ الْمَهَامِّ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Lejla započinje svoj dan pisanjem liste dnevnih zadataka.
sentences.translationEn: Layla starts her day by writing a daily to-do list.

sentences.arabic: تُرَكِّزُ عَلَى الْأَعْمَالِ الْهَامَّةِ فِي السَّاعَاتِ الْأُولَى مِنَ النَّهَارِ.
sentences.translation: Fokusira se na važne poslove u prvim satima dana.
sentences.translationEn: She focuses on important tasks in the early hours of the day.

sentences.arabic: تُغْلِقُ هَاتِفَهَا الْمَحْمُولَ لِتَجَنُّبِ التَّشْتِيتِ أَثْنَاءَ الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Isključuje svoj mobilni telefon kako bi izbjegla ometanje tokom rada.
sentences.translationEn: She turns off her mobile phone to avoid distractions during work.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الطَّرِيقَةُ تُسَاعِدُهَا عَلَى إِنْجَازِ الْكَثِيرِ مِنَ الْمَشَارِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Ova metoda joj pomaže da završi mnogo projekata.
sentences.translationEn: This method helps her accomplish many projects.
